title: Mace moves to force vote on requiring Ethics Committee to release sexual misconduct reports
author: Sudiksha Kochi
fullText: Rep. Nancy Mace (R-S.C.) took to the House floor on Tuesday with a motion to force a vote on her resolution directing the House Ethics Committee to preserve and publicly release all reports on investigations into members of Congress regarding allegations of sexual harassment of staff or of a sexual relationship with a member of…
